# Shadowrun Discord Bot - .NET Edition

A high-performance Discord bot for Shadowrun 3rd Edition roleplaying, rewritten in .NET 8 for maximum efficiency.

## Quick Start

1. Copy `.env.example` to `.env` and fill in your Discord credentials
2. Run `./start.sh` (Linux/macOS) or `dotnet run` (Windows)
3. Access the GM Web UI at http://localhost:5000

## Features

✨ Complete Shadowrun 3rd Edition implementation
🎲 Friedman dice rolling with cryptographically secure RNG
⚔️ Turn-based combat system
🔮 Full magic system with spirits and astral projection
💻 Matrix/cyberdeck mechanics
🤖 Cyberware and bioware tracking
🌐 RESTful Web API for GM tools
🔒 JWT authentication and rate limiting
⚡ Optimized for performance with .NET 8

## Documentation

- [README.md](README.md) - Full documentation
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) - Version history
- [API Documentation](http://localhost:5000/api-docs) - Swagger UI (when running)

## Requirements

- .NET 8 SDK
- Discord Bot Token
- Discord Application Client ID
